feedback_text: The library is extremely noisy and it's hard to study. The quiet zones are overcrowded during peak hours.
Excellent teaching quality! Professor Reyes explains concepts very clearly and engages the class well.
The WiFi in the academic buildings keeps disconnecting. Very frustrating for online submissions.
Student services office was very helpful in resolving my enrollment issues. Great support!
The air conditioning in Building A is not working properly. It's very hot during afternoon classes.
The cafeteria food quality has improved. More vegetarian options would be appreciated.
The parking lot is always full. Need more parking spaces for students.
Lab equipment is outdated and frequently breaks down. We need new equipment for practical sessions.
Teaching quality is outstanding! Professors are knowledgeable and approachable during office hours.
The registrar's office processes documents slowly. Had to wait 3 weeks for my transcript.
Library extended hours would help students who have evening classes. Currently closes at 9 PM.
Excellent facilities! Clean buildings
The internet bandwidth is insufficient during exams. Too many students competing for connection.
Teaching quality varies widely. Some professors are inspiring
category: others are disengaged and read from slides.

feedback_text: Student counseling services are understaffed. Had to wait 2 months for an appointment.
The campus is very clean and well-organized. Great maintenance team!
WiFi connection is stable and fast. Much better than last year!
The quality of teaching has improved significantly this semester. More interactive classes.
Admissions office staff were rude when I called about my application status.
The library has excellent collection of books and databases. Very helpful for research.
Classroom air conditioning needs repair. Some rooms are freezing
Great support from student affairs! They organized amazing events and activities this year.
Teaching methods are outdated. More use of modern technology would help.
The commuter shuttle service is very helpful and runs on schedule.
Internet speed is slow during midterm and final exam periods.
Facilities are generally good but some restrooms need cleaning more frequently.
Professors are very supportive and provide constructive feedback on assignments.
The bookstore prices are too high compared to other universities.
Campus infrastructure is impressive. New buildings look great!
Very responsive student services team. They resolved my issue within 24 hours.
The WiFi occasionally drops. Should investigate the router placement.
Some classrooms lack proper lighting and make it hard to see the board.
Teaching quality depends on the instructor. Some are excellent
Student health services are limited. Need more doctors available especially during flu season.
Parking fee is reasonable but lot is always full by 9 AM.
The campus is well-equipped with modern facilities and technology.
Professors use engaging teaching methods and make concepts clear and understandable.
Administrative processes are complicated and there's lack of clear communication.
Great campus environment! Landscaping is beautiful and peaceful.
Internet bandwidth is insufficient during peak hours causing slow connections.
Teaching assistants are helpful but some lack expertise in their subject areas.
Student services website is confusing and hard to navigate to find needed information.
The library renovations look excellent. Much improved study areas and seating.
WiFi in dorm rooms frequently disconnects making online learning difficult.
Class sizes are too large making it hard for professors to provide individual attention.
Student feedback system is great! Happy to see university is taking our input seriously.
The campus emergency alert system gives fast notifications. Appreciated.
Lab facilities are well-maintained and regularly updated with new equipment.
Teaching quality would improve if there were smaller class sizes for better interaction.
Campus security staff are professional and responsive to concerns. Feel safe on campus.
